permissions._comment: Project-wide auto-approve list. Personal/per-machine entries belong in settings.local.json.

sandbox._comment: OS-level sandboxing (macOS Seatbelt). Constrains Bash tool calls to the writes/domains below.

filesystem._comment: Project root is writable by default. Entries below are extras outside it or specific carve-outs.

network._comment: GitHub for gh/git, Go module proxy for go build/test, npm registry for pnpm.
